data.html:
We have been able to define transitions, consider evidence based approaches for successful transitions, and introduced to the benefits of the Transition Navigator role.

Now it's time for you to meet Bethany who is a 27 year old young adult who has sickle cell disease. She transitioned from paediatric to adult care almost 10 years ago.

So listen to her story and reflect on ways you could help her.
What is one thing you could do as a healthcare provider to improve Bethany's transition?

items.html: Transition from paediatric to adult care is complex
As healthcare professionals, you must listen to and partner with your patients to advocate for the best care and access to resources to help improve transitions
With the right supports in place, education available, and access to care that AYAs need, transitions can be successful

candidates.suggestion: Render as open text-entry survey question instead of rich_text
candidates.reason: The reflection prompt 'What is one thing you could do as a healthcare provider to improve Bethany's transition?' is an open-ended question with no answer options or explanation. Per spec it must be rich_text (not quiz_inline). A future platform survey block with open text-entry would be the ideal interaction if desired.
